task: Verify and harden Copilot CLI hook plugin-root anchoring (PR 2206, issue 2205) with runtime-contract regression guard

events.content: Verify and harden plugin hook path anchoring for BOTH Claude and Copilot (PR 2206, issue 2205). Empirically establish the runtime env-var contract, fix PowerShell fallback asymmetry, and add an enforceable anti-regression gate plus real-CLI e2e tests.

Empirically verified Copilot CLI 1.0.57 sets COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT and CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT (undocumented) and runs hooks with cwd=user dir; proved the generated bash command resolves end-to-end (exit 0). Verified Claude Code 2.1.159 sets CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT and resolves the anchored command (exit 0). Fixed _build_copilot_entry to give PowerShell the same COPILOT->CLAUDE fallback as bash; regenerated src/copilot-cli/hooks/hooks.json (49 entries). Replaced the self-referential string-match test with a runtime-contract test; added scripts/validation/validate_hook_anchoring.py (covers Claude + Copilot, generator-derived) wired into pre_pr.py; added tests/e2e/test_cli_hook_e2e.py that vendor-installs into each real CLI. Verification: `uv run pytest tests/build_scripts/test_generate_hooks_plugin_root.py tests/build_scripts/test_generate_hooks_runtime_contract.py tests/test_validate_hook_anchoring.py` -> 12 passed. `RUN_CLI_E2E=1 uv run pytest tests/e2e/test_cli_hook_e2e.py` -> 2 passed (both real CLIs). `python3 scripts/validation/validate_hook_anchoring.py` -> [PASS] 94 hook entries anchored. `uvx ruff check` -> All checks passed.
Replace placeholder auto-retrospectives with real retrospectives for the #2205 work.
